title: Chilled water outlet temperature range (cooling)
summary: The chilled water outlet temperature for cooling operation must be between 5°C and 15°C.

title: Hot water outlet temperature range (heating)
summary: The hot water outlet temperature for heating operation must be between 35°C and 55°C.

title: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air temperature range (cooling)
summary: The inlet air dry-bulb temperature for the air-side heat exchanger during cooling must be between 10°C and 40°C.

structured_payload.parameter_name: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air temperature (cooling)

title: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air temperature range (heating)
summary: The inlet air dry-bulb temperature for the air-side heat exchanger during heating must be between -9.5°C and 21°C.

structured_payload.parameter_name: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air temperature (heating)

title: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air wet-bulb temperature range (heating)
summary: The inlet air wet-bulb temperature for the air-side heat exchanger during heating must be between -10°C and 15.5°C.

structured_payload.parameter_name: Air-side heat exchanger inlet air wet-bulb temperature (heating)

title: Maximum unit tilt during installation
summary: The unit must be installed within a maximum tilt of 30mm over the length and 15mm over the width.

title: Minimum water flow rate for RHU40AHZ1
summary: The minimum chilled water flow rate for model RHU40AHZ1 is 10.8 m³/h.

title: Maximum water flow rate for RHU40AHZ1
summary: The maximum chilled water flow rate for model RHU40AHZ1 is 36 m³/h.

title: Evaporator internal water volume for RHU40AHZ1
summary: The evaporator internal water volume for model RHU40AHZ1 is 0.08 m³.

title: Minimum system water volume for RHU40AHZ1
summary: The minimum system water volume for model RHU40AHZ1 is 0.38 m³.

title: High pressure switch cut-out setting (R22)
summary: The high pressure switch cut-out setting for R22 units is 2.98 MPa.

title: Low pressure cut-out setting (R22)
summary: The low pressure cut-out setting for R22 units is 0.05 MPa.

title: Discharge gas thermostat cut-out temperature
summary: The discharge gas thermostat cut-out temperature is 115°C.

title: Discharge gas thermostat cut-in temperature
summary: The discharge gas thermostat cut-in temperature is 93°C.

title: Oil heater capacity per compressor
summary: The oil heater capacity per compressor is 150 W.

title: Oil heater cut-out temperature
summary: The oil heater cut-out temperature is 75°C.

title: Oil heater cut-in temperature
summary: The oil heater cut-in temperature is 110°C.

title: CCP timer setting (star-delta start to load)
summary: The CCP timer setting from star-delta start to load is 30 seconds.

title: Control circuit fuse capacity
summary: The control circuit fuse capacity is 6 A at 220 V.

title: Fusible plug melting temperature
summary: The fusible plug melting temperature is 72°C.

title: Freeze protection cut-out temperature
summary: The freeze protection cut-out temperature is 2°C.

title: Fan motor overcurrent relay setting
summary: The fan motor overcurrent relay setting is 3.3 A at 380 V 50 Hz.

title: Pressure relief valve start-to-discharge setting
summary: The pressure relief valve start-to-discharge setting is 3.13 MPa.

title: Star-delta start timer setting
summary: The star-delta start timer setting is 5 seconds.

title: Compressor start delay timer default setting
summary: The default compressor start delay timer setting is 3 minutes (DSW2 pins 1 and 2 both OFF).

title: Neutral zone temperature setting default
summary: The default neutral zone temperature setting is 2.0°C (RSW8 set to 3).
evidence_quote: 标准设定= 2 度，开关 RSW8出厂时已设定为 3 = 2度

title: Chilled water temperature setpoint default
summary: The default chilled water outlet temperature setpoint is 7°C (RSW1=0, RSW2=7).
evidence_quote: 建议将冷冻水出口温度设定为 7 ℃，开关 RSW1 和 RSW2 已分别设定在 0 和7

title: Hot water temperature setpoint default
summary: The default hot water outlet temperature setpoint is 45°C (RSW3=4, RSW4=5).
evidence_quote: 建议将温水出口温度设定为= 45 ℃。开关 RSW3和RSW4 已分别设定在 4 和5

title: High pressure switch alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-H1 indicates high pressure switch activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-H1 ... 高压压力开关动作

title: Low suction gas pressure alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-L1 indicates low suction gas pressure alarm for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-L1 ... 吸入气体压力过低警报

title: Fan motor overcurrent relay alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-F1 indicates fan motor overcurrent relay activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-F1 ... 风扇电机过电流继电器动作

title: Low suction gas temperature alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-t1 indicates low suction gas temperature alarm for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-t1 ... 吸入气体温度过低警报

title: Fan motor internal thermostat alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-41 indicates fan motor internal thermostat activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-41 ... 风扇电机内部温控器动作

title: Compressor overcurrent relay alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-51 indicates compressor overcurrent relay activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-51 ... 压缩机过电流继电器动作

title: Oil supply protection thermostat alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-61 indicates oil supply protection thermostat activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-61 ... 供油保护温控器动作

title: Compressor motor internal thermostat alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-71 indicates compressor motor internal thermostat activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-71 ... 压缩机电机内部温控器动作

title: Freeze protection thermistor alarm code (THMo1)
summary: Alarm code C1-81 indicates freeze protection thermistor (THMo1) activation for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-81 ... 防冻结保护热敏电阻动作(THMo1 ～6)

title: Freeze protection thermistor alarm code (THMi1)
summary: Alarm code 80 indicates freeze protection thermistor (THMi1) activation.
evidence_quote: 80 80 80 80 80 80 防冻结保护热敏电阻动作(THMi1)

title: Pump feedback abnormal alarm code
summary: Alarm code 5P indicates abnormal pump feedback signal.
evidence_quote: 5P 5P 5P 5P 5P 5P 水泵反馈信息不正常警报

title: Reverse phase or single phase alarm code
summary: Alarm code C1-05 indicates reverse phase or single phase (phase loss) alarm for cycle 1.
evidence_quote: C1-05 ... 反相或单相（缺相）警报
